titleStmt.title: SII 17.564: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 564. (A.R. No. 521 of 1904.) TIRUNELLIKKĀVAL, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Āmalakēśvara temple.

This inscription records the grant of land for a garden to god Tirunellikkāuḍaiyār, by Maṟaiñāṉasambandar and Āḻittērvittagar, residing at the Tiruñāṉasambandan-tiruguhai. It mentions Kuṟukkai Purandaraguru-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irācarācatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 patāvatu Uṭaiyār tirunellikkā Āḷu(u)ṭaiyār tevartāṉattuk kāṇi Uṭaiya tiṭṭaicceriuṭai
yāṉ tillaiperumāṉum Ivar tampi kaṇṭarātitta tevanum Ivaṉtampi Uyyavantapiḷḷaiyum pakkal Ikkoyil tāṉattār tiru nāmattukkāṇiyāka koṇṭu tiruñāṉacampantaṉ
tirukkukaiyil Irukkum maṟaiñāṉacampantaṉum Āḻitter vittakarum taṅkaḷ piyaril tiri viṭuvittu koṇṭu tirunantavaṉamāka viṭukiṟa nattam Uvaccaṉkālukku teṟkku tirunāmat
tu kāṇikku naṭuvupaṭṭa Oḻukkaikkum vaṭanattam kuḻi Aṟupatteṭṭukkum piramāṇavilaippaṭi kācu Āyirattinūṟum cipaṇṭārattu tāṉattārvacam Oṭukki Iṉṉilaṅkaḷum kuḻi 6 10 8
Ikkuḻi Aṟupatteṭṭum Uṭaiyāṟku tirunantavaṉamāka viṭṭo
m Immaṟaiñāṉacampantarum Ivāḻittervittakarum Iviru
vom koyiṟkaṇakku koṟaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu kuṟukkai
purantarakuruccatuṟvetimaṅkalattu taccakāṇiuṭaiya
vekantiri muṭaiyān Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 17.564 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
